title: Syrian Quesadilla
description: A fusion of Syrian and Mexican flavors in a crispy quesadilla. The smoky lamb and grilled onions add a depth of flavor that complements the sumac perfectly.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan to medium heat.
Brush the quesadillas with olive oil on both sides.
Season the lamb with salt and cook in the pan until browned.
Add the grilled onions to the pan and cook for another minute.
Sprinkle the sumac over the lamb and onions.
Place a quesadilla in the pan, topped with lamb, onions, and feta cheese.
Fold the quesadilla in half and cook until crispy and golden brown.
Flip the quesadilla and cook the other side until crispy.
